name: Lead follow-up
description: Every new lead gets a follow-up task on your list the moment it lands — no lead goes cold in the pipeline.
prompt: Whenever a new client or lead is added to my pipeline, look up who they are and add a task "Follow up with <name>" so the first touch never slips.

vault.why: Reacts to new leads in your pipeline and files a follow-up task naming the person.
